patch.value: Read-only deep audit of src/ + packages/: dead code, duplication, type safety, perf timings (sandbox + real repo), dependency review, architecture invariant verification. Findings filed as linked items tagged audit-2026-06-12.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit complete. TIMINGS (hyperfine, sandbox /tmp/pm-perf-audit unless noted): pm --version 36ms; pm show 125ms; pm list --compact 139ms (real repo: 303ms, extension overhead as expected); pm create 140ms; pm update 142ms; pm search 185ms; create+close roundtrip 275-310ms total; pm health (real repo) 1.69s. NO REGRESSION vs May instant-mutations work (mutations ~140ms each, well under 250ms). Hot-path I/O instrumented via fs hook: only 24 distinct file reads per command, settings.json read ONCE (pm-2bn5 concern not currently biting); minor: package.json parsed 4x and managed-extensions.json 2x per command (sub-ms, not filed). INVARIANTS: all HELD - settings-validator dependency-free (no zod); front-matter cache + skip-unchanged-writes + hasActiveOnReadHooks fast path present; per-command code-splitting intact (register-mutation dynamically imports each command module; registration-helpers barrel imports are type-only; mcp/server.ts eager barrel import is fine for the long-lived server). TYPE SAFETY: 0 ': any', 0 'as any', 0 ts-ignore in src; 49 'as unknown as' concentrated in item-format.ts/plan.ts record-bridge casts (known accepted pattern). LOC: max file 2504 (loader.ts), all under 3400 cap; static gate green. DEPS: 5 runtime deps all justified; only commander has a new major (15.0.0, not urgent); registry was ENETUNREACH-flaky so pnpm outdated partial. Recent commits 8b8e6d6b/9379cefa/PR#199 audited: new core/validate + lock-gc + query-summary modules are clean, pure, well-documented. FINDINGS FILED: pm-dzcx (P3 levenshtein dedup, safe quick-win), pm-vn9l (P3 export hygiene incl 1 truly dead constant, safe quick-win for the dead constant), pm-3rjo (P3 compact recovery duplicate keys, safe quick-win).

author: codex-implementation-agent
message: Continue implementation on code-quality/perf container: remove remaining package-source any casts and verify package runtime.

value.note: Remove package-source any[] casts from todos metadata import preservation
Replace residual telemetry nested payload any cast with structural test type
Replace beads package test any casts with narrow JSON response shape
Replace guide-shell package test any casts with SDK GlobalOptions and ServiceOverrideContext
Focused package runtime and telemetry residual no-any regression coverage

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Evidence: removed remaining package-source any[] casts from pm-todos runtime and replaced package/telemetry test as-any casts with narrow structural types using public SDK GlobalOptions/ServiceOverrideContext where applicable. Verification passed: pnpm typecheck; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/packages/beads-command.spec.ts tests/unit/packages/guide-shell-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/core/telemetry/telemetry-runtime-residual.spec.ts; pm test pm-nimu --run --progress; pnpm quality:static; pnpm security:scan; pnpm audit --audit-level moderate; pnpm changelog:pm:check (pm-changelog 2026.6.20, CHANGELOG unchanged); pm health --check-only --summary --json; pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift (history drift ok, known pre-existing missing-resolution warning); node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage = 240 files, 4775 tests, 100/100/100/100; isolated temp PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH smoke init/create/install todos/export/import/list passed; Sentry/telemetry gate passed critical=0 high=0.

patch.value: Code-quality/perf audit container complete: original filed findings are closed, remaining package/test no-any cleanup is implemented, full 100/100/100/100 coverage and temp todos smoke passed.
Completed the code-quality/perf audit container by closing original findings and removing remaining no-any type-safety debt in package source/tests.
All filed audit findings are resolved, package source/test casts avoid any, and repo quality gates remain green.

Original findings pm-dzcx, pm-vn9l, and pm-3rjo are closed; pm-todos runtime and package/telemetry tests now use ItemMetadata/public SDK/structural types; coverage, static quality, security, changelog, temp smoke, health, validate, and Sentry/telemetry gates passed.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Review follow-up evidence: addressed Gemini feedback by narrowing the telemetry residual test to OtelSpanPayloadForTest on spanRequest.payload, and addressed CodeRabbit's formatting consistency note by expanding all pm-todos metadata array ternaries consistently. Re-verified pnpm typecheck and focused package/telemetry tests; no code any casts remain (only text/comment occurrences of the word any).

value.author: codex-review-loop
value.text: Review follow-up evidence: addressed Gemini metadata-validation feedback by coercing todos import linked metadata arrays into SDK shapes before normalizeFrontMatter, including the shipped runtime.js artifact used by pm install todos. Verification after follow-up: pnpm typecheck passed; focused package/telemetry suite passed (48 tests); node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage passed with literal 100/100/100/100 across 240 files and 4775 tests; manual temp smoke with sandboxed PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH installed todos, exported one item, imported malformed linked-test metadata without crash, and listed two items; pm health ok; validate history drift ok with pre-existing resolution warnings; Sentry/telemetry gate passed critical=0 high=0.

patch.value: Replace beads package test any casts with narrow JSON response shape
Replace residual telemetry nested payload any cast with structural test type
Remove package-source any[] casts from todos metadata import preservation
shipped JavaScript runtime artifact for installed todos package metadata validation

value.note: Replace guide-shell package test any casts with SDK GlobalOptions and ServiceOverrideContext

patch.value: manual temp smoke: sandboxed PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH; pm init smoke-project --force; pm install todos --project; pm todos export; mutate exported markdown with malformed linked-test metadata; pm todos import; pm list verified exported=1 imported=1 skipped=0 list=2 warnings=[]

value.note: Focused package runtime and telemetry residual no-any regression coverage
